title: Language programmes evaluation: interim report
body: "The evaluation focuses on the:   Language Assistants Programme Language Hubs   There is also consideration for the:   German Promotion Project UK-German Connection   This work was commissioned to explore the implementation of these programmes, their ongoing delivery and any perceived impact.  We conducted surveys, interviews and focus groups with pupils, teachers, language assistants and German expert mentors. Case studies and initial results from this fieldwork are presented and discussed. "
